General.Name: Rexford Industrial Realty Inc
General.Description: Rexford Industrial Realty, Inc. creates value by investing in, operating and repositioning industrial properties throughout infill Southern California, the world's fourth largest industrial market and consistently the highest-demand with lowest-supply major market in the nation over the long term. The Company's highly differentiated strategy enables internal and external growth opportunities through its proprietary value creation and asset management capabilities. Rexford Industrial's high-quality, irreplaceable portfolio comprised 419 properties with approximately 51.2 million rentable square feet occupied by a stable and diverse tenant base. Structured as a real estate investment trust (REIT) listed on the New York Stock Exchange. Rexford Industrial is an S&P MidCap 400 Index member. Rexford Industrial Realty, Inc. was incorporated on January 18th, 2013 in Maryland, USA.
General.Address: 11620 Wilshire Boulevard, Los Angeles, CA, United States, 90025-6821
